bead.title: Escalate repeated same-fingerprint pre-claim warn outcomes to operator attention instead of silently re-idling
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Under warn-only policy_mode, pre_claim_intake rejections that share an identical fingerprint repeat across distinct bead IDs every poll cycle. The worker emits pre_claim_intake.warn -> loop.idle (~every 50s) and keeps looking alive while the entire ready queue (observed: 23 ready beads, one fizeau-scoped daemon) sits unclaimed indefinitely. Identical fingerprint across many bead_ids confirms a systemic schema/route mismatch, not a per-bead issue, yet nothing escalates. This child owns the silent-idle escalation slice of parent ddx-61f6c57d.

ROOT CAUSE
The pre-claim warn path emits the warn event and its fingerprint (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:4729-4795) and the loop then emits loop.idle, but without a streak guard a repeated identical-fingerprint warn just loops forever with no operator signal. The fingerprint is computed by preClaimIntakeWarningFingerprint (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:3850); the consecutive-streak state is preClaimWarnRepeatState.record (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:3802-3814); the threshold default is DefaultPreClaimWarnRepeatThreshold (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:230-232, default 5).

PROPOSED FIX
After N (default DefaultPreClaimWarnRepeatThreshold = 5) consecutive pre_claim_intake warn outcomes sharing the same fingerprint across distinct bead IDs, have the worker emit a loop.operator_attention event (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:4791) carrying the repeated fingerprint, repeat count, and distinct-bead-ID count, and stop looping silently rather than continuing to emit loop.idle. Drive escalation from preClaimWarnRepeatState.record keyed on preClaimIntakeWarningFingerprint.

NON-SCOPE
Do not touch the readiness_checks schema, producer prompt, or the Go verdict decoder — that is the sibling child (CI schema gate). Do not change warn-only policy_mode semantics for non-repeated warns. Do not implement any other parent acceptance criterion. Preserve every parent non-scope constraint.
bead.acceptance:
1. After DefaultPreClaimWarnRepeatThreshold (default 5; cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:230-232) consecutive pre_claim_intake warn outcomes sharing the same fingerprint across distinct bead IDs, the worker emits a loop.operator_attention event (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:4791) carrying the repeated fingerprint and counts instead of continuing to emit loop.idle silently. Fingerprint is computed by preClaimIntakeWarningFingerprint (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:3850); the streak is tracked by preClaimWarnRepeatState.record (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:3802).
2. TestPreClaimWarnSameFingerprintEscalatesAfterThreshold (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_stay_alive_test.go:194) injects a faulty readiness payload yielding repeated identical-fingerprint warns and asserts the operator-attention escalation fires once the streak crosses the threshold.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
